title: #5 - New to Back Market? Everything you need to know about the key factors to success
bodyHtml:
Each of the following points is essential for a successful start on the platform and will help you answer the form at the end to increase your current daily sales limit from 6 to 10.

You have now acquired the basics for managing your business on Back Market. Nevertheless, some key tools can help you to improve your activity on the platform!
 

BackBox algorithm

Quality is crucial to winning the BackBox. The BackBox system is based on a proprietary algorithm that calculates your price for a given listing using 10 different quality metrics that we track on a weekly basis.

The better your quality performance, the higher you can charge for an item and still get the BackBox. 
For more information, check out this article

In addition, you have access to a dashboard on your Back Office that allows you to see the impact of your quality on your prices, per KPI. If your quality is good, you are able to price your devices higher than your competitors and still win the backbox.
 


Quality performance metrics

In addition to the quality performance dashboards, find our quality technical guides here

 

Testing software programs

To ensure consistency and high standards, all sellers will be required to test their smartphones before shipping with one of the approved testing software solutions for smartphone diagnostics listed below.

 

Name

Approval

PhoneCheck

Approved

Blackbelt Smartphone Defence

Approved

FutureDial

Approved

NSYS

Approved

ICE (MannapovLLC)

Approved

Blancco

Approved

M360

Approved

DrFones

Approved

Piceasoft

Approved


Learn more about the approved testing softwares. 


Learn more about testing requirements. 

 

Please note that according to our quality charter, you must be able to provide us with a full test report if requested.

In any case, we advise you to test your product before putting it online, as well as before each order.
 

New Battery offer

Customers can now choose to upgrade their smartphones and MacBooks with new batteries.

Read more about this new offer here

If your quality KPIs match the outlined expectations, and if you know how to replace batteries with new ones, feel free to reach out through the SSC contact forms to apply.

 

Premium grade

Customers can also buy smartphones, iPads and MacBooks under a new Premium grade, with higher expectations in terms of functionality and aesthetical conditions. If you can source high-quality supply with original parts and high battery health (CPO, ASIS/ASIS+, open-box supply), feel free to contact us through the SSC contact forms and apply to sell this grade.

Read more about Premium grade here.


 

Secret to selling well on Back Market

International markets 

The strength of Back Market lies in the fact that it opens up many European markets, allowing you to be visible to tens of millions of consumers. Our platform has been created in such a way that you can easily sell in one or 13 countries in Europe, all on a turnkey basis, without having to make any investment or effort.

As you know, one of the main levers for developing sales is to sell in all these countries.

You just need to configure compliant shipping methods and define pricing rules in every country you want to sell in, and you’re all set!
And check out our International Pricing Tool here


Use integrations to optimize your efficiency

Integrations are the most scalable way to update your offers on Back Market and allow you to manage your workflow by transferring data via API, managing listings, orders, shipping, and automating Back Office tasks.

There’s a wide range of marketplace integrations to select from, allowing you to connect to our platform via API.


How can you select the right integration?
First, analyse your needs and look for an integration that meets them (creating listings, managing inventory, pricing, invoices, shipments, etc.).

You can either develop integrations yourself internally (first-party integrations) or use integrations from an external service provider (third-party integrations). 

Here are some names of integrations we work with: ChannelAdvisor, ChannelEngine, Linnworks, SellerCloud, ShipStation, ShoppingFeed, and Wholecell.

Add a new integration directly from your Back-Office here


How can Back Market help you?
If Back Market has access to the code of the integration software you're using, you can contact the Seller Support Center for help.

You can find more details here.
 

 


Grow your sales volume

Within your Back Office account you have access to a number of business reports which can be used to identify your sales trends, recognize top performing products and discover new opportunities for growing your business. 

 


Back Market services

You’ll find all our articles associated with our services here
 

BackShip

BackShip is a service that allows you to issue pre-filled shipping labels in 1 click, directly from your Back Office. This service allows you to benefit from competitive prices with our international shipping provider partners and will increase your On-Time Delivery Rate.
In addition, the return logistics are fully managed by our service and at no extra cost.

For more general information on BackShip, check out this article

Find pricing information here

You can subscribe to BackShip, via the Seller Support Center contact form, then check out how to set up your Back Ship shipping options in this article.

Thanks to our Back Ship service, you can set up regular pick-ups and delegate shipping provider investigations, directly handled by Back Market. Here is how to set up a regular pickup 

 

BackPack

Discover our packaging offer for smartphones and laptops here

The service has many advantages. Indeed, the packaging is very functional, takes only a few seconds to assemble and can be reused. Moreover, there is no extra cost as it is included in the CCBM fees.

You can place an order directly from your Back Office, from the delivery options tab.
 

Our Trade-in service 

Trade-in is a simple tool that allows refurbishers to source devices directly from Back Market customers. More than 150,000 products are bought back every month! You can access this service once your launch phase has been completed and validated.

You can use this service if:

  • You already sell on our platform
  • You are live in France, Spain, Germany or the UK


You can find more information directly here

 

Our tools

BackPricer

Our BackPricer works 24/7 to optimize your listings in real-time to the highest selling price possible without losing the BackBox. 

Here’s how it works: simply set your minimum and target prices and BackPricer uses its secret sauce to find the best possible price for you (based on your quality score), either by hitting your target price or the optimal price between your target price and your minimum price, this is the highest price at which you can win the BackBox.
More information about this tool here
 

Customer Care tools

To save you time, we’ve reduced your after-sales management to a few buttons. Back Market agents will let you know if you need to get involved in a customer contact, and you can easily select different options for returns, replacements, repairs, adding tracking information, resolving shipping provider investigations, and more. Using these buttons is the only way for you to take action in your after-sales interface.

 


How do I complete this module?

We know that this is a lot of information. To make sure you’ve got all of this, take 3 minutes to fill out this form. It will give you a chance to increase your sales limit from 6 to 10 sales per day.
 

Thank you for completing the four trainings, please make sure you comply with our quality standards to validate your Launch Phase, if you have any questions you can contact us via the SSC contact forms.
